confidence_note: This model's backtested accuracy (51.4%) was not statistically distinguishable from simply always predicting the majority class (52.8%) -- McNemar's test, same methodology used for the gold predictor. Treat this prediction as having no reliable edge beyond the obvious baseline.
price_confidence_note: This price forecast's error was not statistically better than assuming tomorrow's price equals today's price (Wilcoxon signed-rank test). Present the dollar figure as the model's best guess only.
